paragraphs.text: Student of the Jean Monnet Modules project “DERECHO”: ‘Defense of European Rights and Excellence for Consumers HHarmonisation’, No 101239437. Project financed by the European Union. Jean Monnet Actions in the field of Higher Education: Modules. Call for tenders ERASMUS-JMO-2025-HEI-TCH-RSCH. What I like this law is the guarantee that everyone can access and protect all citizens. Making the digital world not only left for a few, but for everyone to have real participation, this helps equal opportunities. In a context of digital fairness, it seems to me necessary not only to have access, but also to secure access: persons are not discriminated against, which are not excluded for technical, economic or social reasons.
